# GroundWork LLM Knowledge Index

This file indexes the canonical documentation for GroundWork to optimize agent discovery and context loading.

- [What GroundWork Is](docs/product.md): The product description — the problem GroundWork solves, the two-mode lifecycle, what ships, and who it is for.
- [Getting Started](docs/getting-started.md): One greenfield session walked end to end — init, discovery, review gates, scaffold, first bet — with excerpts from a real session.
- [Example: Greenfield Output](docs/examples/greenfield-verse.md): The actual artifacts a completed greenfield setup committed — architecture summary, ADR set, and the first bet pitch, verbatim from a real run.
- [GroundWork Product Brief](docs/product-brief.md): The executive summary of GroundWork — capabilities, constraints, and what is in vs. out of scope.
- [GroundWork and BMAD](docs/groundwork-vs-bmad.md): How GroundWork differs from BMAD-METHOD, and the locked decision to remain standalone while adopting BMAD's operational mechanics.
- [Host Agent Support](docs/host-support.md): What GroundWork requires of a host agent, what degrades gracefully, and the honest verified/untested support matrix.
- [How We Work](src/docs/ways-of-working/how-we-work.md): The philosophical foundation — Upfront Technical Delivery, the two-mode lifecycle, and the Operating Contract.
- [Lifecycle Index](docs/lifecycle/index.md): How the Setup, Delivery Loop, and Maintenance layers fit together.
- [Setup](docs/lifecycle/01-setup.md): The one-time setup pipeline — greenfield's six phases from Product Brief through First Bet, and brownfield's scan/extract/adopt track — converging on the same delivery loop.
- [Delivery Loop](docs/lifecycle/02-delivery-loop.md): The repeating five-phase Bet workflow — Discovery, Design Foundations, Decomposition, Delivery, Validation.
- [Maintenance](docs/lifecycle/03-maintenance.md): How docs stay current — Living Documents during bets, `groundwork-doc-sync` for surgical patches, `groundwork-check` for CI drift detection.
- [Capability Core and Surfaces](docs/principles/capability-core-and-surfaces.md): The multi-surface model — one headless capability core, N surface adapters, the surface registry, and the capability parity ledger.
- [Surface Stack Selection](docs/principles/surface-stack-selection.md): How GroundWork picks the standard stack per surface platform — training-set fluency, the agent-closable loop, the capability ceiling.
- [Typescript: Frontend](docs/principles/stack/typescript/frontend.md): Stack-specific engineering principles.
- [Python: Async](docs/principles/stack/python/async.md): Stack-specific engineering principles.
- [Python: Documentation](docs/principles/stack/python/documentation.md): Stack-specific engineering principles.
- [Python: Mcp](docs/principles/stack/python/mcp.md): Stack-specific engineering principles.
- [Python: Resilience](docs/principles/stack/python/resilience.md): Stack-specific engineering principles.
- [Python: Testing](docs/principles/stack/python/testing.md): Stack-specific engineering principles.
- [Go: Concurrency](docs/principles/stack/go/concurrency.md): Stack-specific engineering principles.
- [Go: Overview](docs/principles/stack/go/index.md): Stack-specific engineering principles.
- [Go: Testing](docs/principles/stack/go/testing.md): Stack-specific engineering principles.
- [Flutter: Overview](docs/principles/stack/flutter/index.md): Stack-specific engineering principles for mobile surfaces — survey-dated set covering architecture, state, widgets, testing, native interop, releases.
- [Flutter: Architecture](docs/principles/stack/flutter/architecture.md): Stack-specific engineering principles.
- [Flutter: State Management](docs/principles/stack/flutter/state-management.md): Stack-specific engineering principles.
- [Flutter: Widgets & Composition](docs/principles/stack/flutter/widgets-and-composition.md): Stack-specific engineering principles.
- [Flutter: Testing](docs/principles/stack/flutter/testing.md): Stack-specific engineering principles.
- [Flutter: Platform Channels](docs/principles/stack/flutter/platform-channels.md): Stack-specific engineering principles.
- [Flutter: Releases & Distribution](docs/principles/stack/flutter/releases-and-distribution.md): Stack-specific engineering principles.
- [Electron: Overview](docs/principles/stack/electron/index.md): Stack-specific engineering principles for desktop surfaces — survey-dated set covering process model, IPC contracts, security, packaging; renderer idiom defers to the TypeScript set.
- [Electron: Process Model](docs/principles/stack/electron/process-model.md): Stack-specific engineering principles.
- [Electron: IPC Contracts](docs/principles/stack/electron/ipc-contracts.md): Stack-specific engineering principles.
- [Electron: Security](docs/principles/stack/electron/security.md): Stack-specific engineering principles.
- [Electron: Packaging & Updates](docs/principles/stack/electron/packaging-and-updates.md): Stack-specific engineering principles.

## Repository internals (contributors)

- [Contributor Guide](.agents/skills/groundwork-contributor/SKILL.md): Repo orientation — architecture, lifecycle, cross-phase contracts, test infrastructure, the plans convention, and the release process.
- [Design Plans](docs/plans/): One plan document per cross-cutting restructure, carrying the design rationale for the repo's current shape. Each plan's Status header states its execution state — verify it against the working tree before executing from it.
- [Changelog](CHANGELOG.md): Release history; `[migration]` entries are surfaced to existing installations by `npx groundwork-method update`.
